notes:
LTHW Dosing
Systems to be treated as molybdate only

**chem in unit**

Via fitted dosing pot

2 x Hy-Closehib-MAP-DILUTE 20 (11.9L) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Alkanolamine, Azole, Co-polymer, Molybdate, Phosphonate corrosion inhibitors. Suitable for Multi-metal Systems including Aluminium and Zinc. Target >250mg/l as MoO4. 1% system volume dose rate option. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.9L) drums

Remove and return empty drums to unit

title: CBP - Hazelwood 2
notes:
To dose the CHW and LTHW

**chem in unit**

Remove and return empty drums to unit

Via fitted dosing pot

3 x Hy-Closehib-MN (12.5kg) - Closed System Corrosion Inhibitor - blend of Nitrite, Azole, Molybdate corrosion inhibitors. Target >300mg/l as MoO4. Supplied in 12.5kg(11.5L) drums
- Dose the LTHW - to target 300-600 as MoO4

1 x Hy-Bio-TRI - Triazine/Formaldehyde broad spectrum biocide. Shot dose 30-500 mg/L Broad pH Range (0.05% system volume).
- 2.5 litres into LTHW
- 3 litres into CHW.

1 x Hy-Inhib-YEL - Benzotriazole Supplementary Yellow metal (copper/brass) inhibitor. High Concentrate. Closed systems 75-140ppm dose rate. Cooling Towers refer to data sheet.
- Dose 400ml into CHW

title: 2 Picton Place
notes:
DOSING QUOTE HAS BEEN BASED ON MID RANGE OF ESTIMATED VOLUME - SO 1,500 LITRES**.

19 litres of WTP M27 to be dosed into LTHW system.

1 litre of WTP C745 to be dosed into LTHW system.

**AS SYSTEM VOLUME HAS BEEN ESTIMATED, PLEASE ENSURE THAT THE ATTENDING ENGINEER CARRIES OUT THE DOSING ON A GRADUAL BASIS AND CARRIES OUT REGULAR ONSITE TESTING TO ENSURE THAT THE SYSTEMS ARE NOT OVERDOSED.**

To dose the LTHW system with corrosion inhibitor and biocide, as per recommendations in closed system analysis report RCABH2PP260312.

To be carried out across 3 visits:

Visit 1 is for the biocide.

2 x M27 - Multi Functional Closed System Corrosion and Scale Treatment - 1% of the system volume to give 300 ppm nitrite (as NaNO2) and 300 ppm molybdate (as MoO4). Non aggressive to Aluminium. Aids Cleaning. Supplied in 10L container. - 19 litres to be dosed into LTHW system.


Visit 2 is for the inhibitor.

1 x WTP C745 - Broad Spectrum Triazine based biocide for treatment ofclosed systems targeting Pseudomonas and SRB. Supplied in 10 litre containers. - 1 litre to be dosed into LTHW system.

Visit 3 is for the post dose sampling - to be carried out 7 days after the inhibitor dosing - THIS VISIT WILL BE UNDER THE PPM VISIT DUE
